Portfolio & Projects

A selection of technical projects by AQSA ZAM ZAM MIRZA JOHAR BAIG.

Scalable E-Commerce Backend

Node.js, Express, MongoDB, Docker, AWS EC2

Architected a high-throughput e-commerce RESTful API. Implemented JWT authentication, Redis caching, and payment gateway integration. Containerized and deployed on AWS.

Source Live Demo

Smart Hospital Management System

Java, Spring Boot, MySQL, React

Developed a comprehensive hospital management suite for patient records, appointment scheduling, and automated billing workflows, reducing administrative overhead by 40%.

Source Live Demo

Predictive ML Models Suite

Python, Scikit-Learn, TensorFlow, Pandas

Built and evaluated multiple machine learning models including random forests and deep neural networks for churn prediction and price forecasting with 92% accuracy.

Source Live Demo

Real-time IPO Dashboard Platform

Next.js, Tailwind CSS, WebSockets, Prisma

Created a real-time tracking platform for upcoming Initial Public Offerings. Handled live data feeds using WebSockets and visualized financial metrics dynamically.

Source Live Demo

DevOps Automated Pipeline

GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Terraform, AWS S3/CloudFront

Designed an end-to-end CI/CD pipeline using Infrastructure as Code (IaC) to automatically provision resources and deploy serverless functions to AWS.

Source Live Demo
